requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs Americas Ecosystem (SAE J1772 Type 1 AC / CCS1 DC)
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与美洲体系（SAE J1772 Type 1交流 / CCS1直流）
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與美洲體系（SAE J1772 Type 1交流 / CCS1直流）

summary.en: Costa Rica's EV charging network, led by ICE (Relectric network) and regional distributors, follows the North American connector ecosystem reflecting the vehicle fleet in the market. AC Level 1 and Level 2 charging uses the SAE J1772 (Type 1) coupler, which is the North American AC charging standard and is defined in IEC 62196-2 as the Type 1 configuration. DC fast charging uses CCS1 (Combined Charging System Combo 1), which combines the SAE J1772 AC portion with two additional DC pins, as defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration EE. The ICE Relectric network has deployed CCS1 and CHAdeMO multi-standard DC stations; as of 2022 data, the installed base included approximately 197 Type 1 (J1772), 83 NEMA 5-15 (Level 1 convenience), 47 CCS1, and 46 CHAdeMO connectors. CHAdeMO is present historically for Japanese vehicle compatibility but CCS1 is the growing DC fast-charge standard for new deployments aligned with North American OEM direction. NACS (North American Charging Standard / SAE J3400) adoption is emerging in North America but its penetration in Costa Rica has not been confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14 — exporters should verify with ARESEP / ICE before specifying NACS. No IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 (European connector) mandate applies in Costa Rica; this market uses the Type 1 / CCS1 Americas ecosystem.
summary.zh: 哥斯达黎加电动汽车充电网络以ICE（Relectric网络）和区域供电商为主导，遵循北美接口体系，与当地车辆市场保持一致。一级和二级交流充电采用SAE J1772（Type 1）耦合器，这是北美交流充电标准，在IEC 62196-2中定义为Type 1配置。直流快充采用CCS1（联合充电系统Combo 1），在SAE J1772交流部分基础上增加两个直流引脚，在IEC 62196-3 EE配置中定义。ICE Relectric网络已部署CCS1和CHAdeMO多标准直流充电站；据2022年数据，已安装接口约包括197个Type 1（J1772）、83个NEMA 5-15（一级便捷）、47个CCS1和46个CHAdeMO。CHAdeMO历史上为日系车型兼容而存在，但CCS1是顺应北美整车制造商方向的新部署直流快充增长标准。NACS（北美充电标准 / SAE J3400）在北美正在普及，但截至2026年6月14日，其在哥斯达黎加的渗透情况尚未从官方来源得到确认——出口商在指定NACS前应向ARESEP / ICE核实。哥斯达黎加不适用IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（欧洲接口）要求；该市场采用Type 1 / CCS1美洲体系。
summary.zht: 哥斯大黎加電動汽車充電網絡以ICE（Relectric網絡）和區域供電商為主導，遵循北美接口體系，與當地車輛市場保持一致。一級和二級交流充電採用SAE J1772（Type 1）耦合器，這是北美交流充電標準，在IEC 62196-2中定義為Type 1配置。直流快充採用CCS1（聯合充電系統Combo 1），在SAE J1772交流部分基礎上增加兩個直流引腳，在IEC 62196-3 EE配置中定義。ICE Relectric網絡已部署CCS1和CHAdeMO多標準直流充電站；據2022年數據，已安裝接口約包括197個Type 1（J1772）、83個NEMA 5-15（一級便捷）、47個CCS1和46個CHAdeMO。CHAdeMO歷史上為日系車型兼容而存在，但CCS1是順應北美整車製造商方向的新部署直流快充增長標準。NACS（北美充電標準 / SAE J3400）在北美正在普及，但截至2026年6月14日，其在哥斯大黎加的滲透情況尚未從官方來源得到確認——出口商在指定NACS前應向ARESEP / ICE核實。哥斯大黎加不適用IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（歐洲接口）要求；該市場採用Type 1 / CCS1美洲體系。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — SAE Electric Vehicle and Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicle Conductive Charge Coupler (North American AC standard)
IEC 62196-2 Type 1 — Dimensional requirements for SAE J1772 coupler (AC, single-phase)
IEC 62196-3 configuration EE — CCS1 DC fast charge connector
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
SAE J3400 (NACS) — North American Charging Standard (emerging; Costa Rica adoption unconfirmed as of 2026-06-14)

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. The GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler is physically and electrically incompatible with SAE J1772 / IEC 62196 Type 1 vehicle inlets: the GB/T plug is male at the charger side (female at the vehicle), whereas J1772 is female at the charger side (male at the vehicle inlet); pin arrangement, signaling (CC/CP vs CP only), and locking geometry differ. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are a different nine-pin geometry using CAN-bus GB/T 27930 communication, and are physically and electrically incompatible with CCS1, which uses the J1772 AC section plus two DC pins with IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication. No adapter can substitute for hardware connector redesign in either the AC or DC case.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器与SAE J1772 / IEC 62196 Type 1车辆接口在物理和电气层面均不兼容：GB/T充电桩端为公口（车辆端为母口），而J1772充电桩端为母口（车辆接口为公口）；引脚排列、信号（CC/CP与仅CP）和锁止机构均不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器采用不同的九针几何形状，使用CAN总线GB/T 27930通信，与CCS1物理和电气均不兼容——CCS1采用J1772交流部分加两个直流引脚，配合IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信。无论交流还是直流，转接器均不能替代接口硬件重新设计。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器與SAE J1772 / IEC 62196 Type 1車輛接口在物理和電氣層面均不兼容：GB/T充電樁端為公口（車輛端為母口），而J1772充電樁端為母口（車輛接口為公口）；引腳排列、信號（CC/CP與僅CP）和鎖止機構均不同。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器採用不同的九針幾何形狀，使用CAN總線GB/T 27930通訊，與CCS1物理和電氣均不兼容——CCS1採用J1772交流部分加兩個直流引腳，配合IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊。無論交流還是直流，轉接器均不能替代接口硬體重新設計。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Costa Rica's SAE J1772 / CCS1 market. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, control pilot signaling (GB/T CC/CP to J1772 CP-only for AC), DC communication stack (GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS1 DC), labels, test reports, and spare-part strategy. Exporters should confirm with the ICE Relectric network, the site operator, or ARESEP which connector types are required for the specific project or installation site. CHAdeMO should be confirmed as optional rather than primary. NACS / SAE J3400 penetration in Costa Rica should be confirmed with ARESEP / ICE before specifying. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于哥斯达黎加SAE J1772 / CCS1市场。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、控制导引信号（交流从GB/T CC/CP转为J1772仅CP）、直流通信栈（CCS1直流从GB/T 27930 CAN转为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。出口商应向ICE Relectric网络、场地运营商或ARESEP确认具体项目或安装场地所需的接口类型。CHAdeMO应确认为可选而非主要接口。NACS / SAE J3400在哥斯达黎加的渗透情况应在指定前向ARESEP / ICE核实。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於哥斯大黎加SAE J1772 / CCS1市場。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、控制導引信號（交流從GB/T CC/CP轉為J1772僅CP）、直流通訊棧（CCS1直流從GB/T 27930 CAN轉為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。出口商應向ICE Relectric網絡、場地運營商或ARESEP確認具體項目或安裝場地所需的接口類型。CHAdeMO應確認為可選而非主要接口。NACS / SAE J3400在哥斯大黎加的滲透情況應在指定前向ARESEP / ICE核實。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory interoperability requirement — the Costa Rica installed vehicle and charger base uses SAE J1772 (Type 1) for AC and CCS1 for DC fast charging; physical incompatibility with GB/T connectors makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign; confirm current NACS penetration with ARESEP / ICE before specifying
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not a SAE J1772 / CCS1 substitute

source.publisher: ICE — Instituto Costarricense de Electricidad (Relectric EV charging network)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Costa Rica's dominant AC standard is SAE J1772 (Type 1) and dominant DC fast-charge standard is CCS1. GB/T connectors are physically incompatible with J1772 / CCS1 vehicle inlets. Confirm the connector requirement with the specific operator or project before quoting, labelling, or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。哥斯达黎加主流交流标准为SAE J1772（Type 1），主流直流快充标准为CCS1。GB/T接口与J1772 / CCS1车辆接口在物理上不兼容。在报价、贴标或发货前，应向具体运营商或项目方确认接口要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。哥斯大黎加主流交流標準為SAE J1772（Type 1），主流直流快充標準為CCS1。GB/T接口與J1772 / CCS1車輛接口在物理上不兼容。在報價、貼標或發貨前，應向具體運營商或項目方確認接口要求。
